root.name: Create hyperlinks from each experiment name in slide 3 to corresponding Wikipedia pages
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent correctly created hyperlinks from each experiment name in slide 3 to the appropriate Wikipedia pages about the experiment or its researcher(s).

children.name: All experiment names in slide 3 are hyperlinked
children.description: Checks if every experiment name text element in slide 3 has a hyperlink.
children.reason: All experiment name pairs on slide 3 have at least one hyperlinked version (either original name or corresponding experiment name).

children.name: Hyperlink destinations are correct Wikipedia pages
children.description: Checks that the hyperlinks point to Wikipedia pages for the experiment or the researcher(s) as appropriate, scoring them separately.
children.reason: All hyperlinks correctly point to relevant Wikipedia pages for the experiments or researchers.

children.name: No extraneous hyperlinks on slide 3
children.description: Ensures that there are no hyperlinks on slide 3 except on experiment names.
children.reason: No extraneous hyperlinks found on slide 3.

root.reason: The criterion received a perfect score because all experiment names on slide 3 were properly hyperlinked to appropriate Wikipedia pages, with each link correctly directing to either the specific experiment or its associated researcher's page. The implementation was clean and precise, with no unnecessary or extraneous hyperlinks cluttering the slide. Since both critical requirements were fully met - complete coverage of experiment names with hyperlinks and accurate destination URLs - the criterion achieved the highest possible score.

metadata.task: Create hyperlinks from each experiment name in slide 3 to corresponding Wikipedia pages about either the experiment or the researcher(s)
